notes: Field names and widget patterns are highly characteristic of Odoo (v16/v17) Sales module. partner_id is explicitly labelled 'Customer'. product_template_id is the per-line product selector (vs product_id, indicating template-level selection is enabled). product_uom_qty is the standard Odoo quantity field on sale.order.line. 'Add a product' is the canonical Odoo line-add control text.
